function.name: catalog_lepidoptera_specimen
function.description: Register a butterfly or moth specimen into the entomology collection database.

species.description: Latin binomial name of the specimen

prompt: Please log a new Morpho peleides specimen with a 95mm wingspan that I caught in Monteverde, Costa Rica.

function.name: simulate_basalt_cooling_rate
function.description: Model the cooling rate of a basalt lava flow given thickness and ambient conditions.

prompt: Run a cooling simulation for a 12 meter thick basalt flow in 18C air.

function.name: transcribe_cuneiform_tablet
function.description: Produce a transliteration of a cuneiform clay tablet image.

dialect.description: Cuneiform dialect such as Old Babylonian or Sumerian

prompt: Transliterate tablet BM-12087 — it's Old Babylonian.

function.name: appraise_chrysoberyl_grade
function.description: Grade a chrysoberyl gemstone for clarity and color shift.

color_shift_strength.description: Strength of alexandrite-type color shift: weak, moderate, strong

prompt: Appraise this 2.3 carat chrysoberyl — it has a strong color shift.

function.name: chart_sonar_bathymetry_pass
function.description: Plan a multibeam sonar pass over an underwater survey area.

prompt: Chart a sonar pass over the Cascadia Basin down to 2800m.

function.name: identify_lichen_thallus
function.description: Classify a lichen specimen by thallus morphology and substrate.

substrate.description: Surface the lichen was growing on

prompt: Identify this lichen — it's foliose and was growing on oak bark.

function.name: log_glacier_calving_event
function.description: Record a glacier ice calving event with size estimate.

iceberg_volume_m3.description: Estimated volume of calved iceberg in cubic meters

prompt: Log a calving event at Jakobshavn Isbrae — roughly 450000 cubic meters broke off.

function.name: stage_opera_blocking_cue
function.description: Add a blocking cue to an opera staging plan.

destination.description: Where on stage they move to

prompt: Add a blocking cue: in Act 2 scene 3, Tosca moves to stage left.

function.name: appraise_philatelic_cover
function.description: Appraise a postal cover (envelope) for philatelic value.

country_of_origin.description: Country where the cover was posted

prompt: Appraise this 1867 cover from British Guiana.

function.name: schedule_koi_pond_treatment
function.description: Schedule a parasite or water quality treatment for a koi pond.

treatment_type.description: Type of treatment, e.g. praziquantel, salt bath

prompt: Schedule a praziquantel treatment for pond K-7.

function.name: render_portolan_chart_segment
function.description: Render a segment of a medieval portolan-style nautical chart.

wind_rose_count.description: Number of compass roses to place

prompt: Render a portolan segment of the Ligurian coast.

function.name: log_foundry_pour
function.description: Record a metal pour event at a foundry.

mass_kg.description: Mass of poured metal in kilograms

prompt: Log a pour of 220 kg of bronze C95400.

function.name: tune_carillon_bell
function.description: Submit a carillon bell tuning adjustment.

bell_note.description: Nominal pitch of the bell, e.g. C#4

prompt: Adjust the F#4 carillon bell — it's 6 cents flat.

function.name: record_tide_pool_census
function.description: Record a tide pool species census.

prompt: Record tide pool TP-14 census: I counted 23 species.

function.name: submit_falconry_flight_log
function.description: Submit a flight log for a trained falconry bird.

prompt: Log a 42-minute flight for Mira.

function.name: register_meteorite_find
function.description: Register a newly recovered meteorite specimen.

classification.description: Meteorite class, e.g. L6 chondrite, pallasite

prompt: Register a new pallasite, 318 grams.

function.name: press_intaglio_proof
function.description: Pull a proof print from an intaglio etching plate.

ink_color.description: Ink color used for the proof

prompt: Pull a proof from plate E-22 in sepia.

function.name: tag_bryozoan_colony
function.description: Tag a bryozoan colony for long-term monitoring.

colony_area_cm2.description: Approximate colony area in square centimeters

prompt: Tag a 47 cm2 bryozoan colony at site RF-09.

function.name: draft_bookbinder_sewing_pattern
function.description: Draft a sewing pattern for hand binding a book.

stitch_style.description: Sewing style such as Coptic, kettle, longstitch

prompt: Draft a Coptic sewing pattern for 8 signatures.

function.name: log_speleothem_growth_band
function.description: Record an annual growth band measurement from a cave speleothem.

prompt: Log a 38 micron growth band on stalagmite ST-3.

function.name: estimate_pipe_organ_voicing_pressure
function.description: Estimate the required wind pressure for a pipe organ rank.

rank_name.description: Name of the organ stop or rank

hall_volume_m3.description: Volume of the hall in cubic meters

prompt: Estimate voicing pressure for the Principal 8' rank, longest pipe 8 feet, hall volume around 14000 cubic meters.

function.name: plot_dendrochronology_series
function.description: Generate a tree-ring width plot for cross-dating.

prompt: Plot the dendro series for core BCP-22 covering 1742 through 1968.

function.name: annotate_palimpsest_layer
function.description: Annotate a recovered text layer on a palimpsest manuscript.

prompt: Annotate the undertext of Vat. gr. 1209 — the lower layer is Greek.

function.name: simulate_carbonate_compensation_depth
function.description: Simulate the carbonate compensation depth for a given ocean basin profile.

co2_ppm.description: Atmospheric CO2 in parts per million

prompt: Simulate the CCD for the South Pacific Gyre at 420 ppm CO2 and a surface temperature of 24C.

function.name: audit_marionette_string_tension
function.description: Audit the string tensions on a marionette before performance.

string_count.description: Number of strings on the control bar

prompt: Audit string tensions on the Coppelia marionette — she's strung with 9 lines.

function.name: submit_horology_escapement_repair
function.description: Submit a repair ticket for a clock escapement mechanism.

escapement_type.description: Escapement type, e.g. lever, deadbeat, verge

prompt: Open a repair ticket for an ETA 6498 movement — it has a lever escapement that is rebanking under heavy wind.

function.name: plot_aurora_substorm_intensity
function.description: Plot expected auroral substorm intensity for a magnetometer station.

prompt: Plot substorm intensity for the Tromso magnetometer assuming a Kp of 6.7.

function.name: log_truffle_orchard_yield
function.description: Record a harvest yield from a truffle orchard.

prompt: Record a harvest of 612 grams of Tuber melanosporum from block B-4.

function.name: register_taxidermy_mount
function.description: Register a completed taxidermy mount in studio inventory.

prompt: Register a red fox in a stalking pose for client C-118.

function.name: calibrate_seismograph_drum
function.description: Calibrate a drum-style seismograph for paper recording speed and gain.

drum_speed_mm_min.description: Drum advance speed in millimeters per minute

prompt: Calibrate the drum at station HRV — set the advance to 60 mm/min and gain to 54 dB.

function.name: plan_yurt_assembly_sequence
function.description: Plan the assembly sequence for a traditional Mongolian yurt.

prompt: Plan assembly for a 6 meter yurt with 5 khana walls.

function.name: evaluate_ikat_dye_lot
function.description: Evaluate consistency of an ikat dye lot used in traditional weaving.

fiber.description: Fiber type, e.g. silk warp, cotton weft

prompt: Evaluate dye lot UZ-441, indigo from Indigofera tinctoria, on silk warp.

function.name: diagnose_bagpipe_drone_reed
function.description: Diagnose a malfunctioning bagpipe drone reed.

prompt: Diagnose my bass drone — it's double-toning whenever I strike in.

function.name: log_apiary_swarm_capture
function.description: Log a captured honeybee swarm at an apiary.

queen_seen.description: Whether the queen was visually confirmed

prompt: Log a swarm capture at apiary A-2, about 18000 bees, and yes I spotted the queen.

function.name: draft_kintsugi_repair_estimate
function.description: Draft a repair estimate for a kintsugi (gold-lacquer) ceramic repair.

prompt: Draft a kintsugi estimate — it's a tea bowl in 7 pieces, finished in gold.

function.name: schedule_obsidian_hydration_dating
function.description: Submit an obsidian hydration rim dating job to the lab queue.

prompt: Queue up hydration dating for artifact ANZ-558, suspected source Mayor Island.

function.name: compose_carillon_ringing_change
function.description: Compose a change-ringing sequence for a tower carillon.

method_name.description: Change-ringing method, e.g. Plain Bob, Grandsire

bell_count.description: Number of bells in the ring

prompt: Compose a Plain Bob sequence on 8 bells.

function.name: register_orchid_hybrid_cross
function.description: Register a new orchid hybrid cross with the registry.

grex_name.description: Proposed grex name for the cross

prompt: Register a new hybrid: pod parent Cattleya warscewiczii, pollen parent Cattleya dowiana, grex name Empress Augusta.

function.name: log_glassblower_furnace_charge
function.description: Log a fresh glass batch charge into a glassblowing furnace.

mass_kg.description: Mass of glass charged in kilograms

prompt: Log a 35 kg charge of cobalt blue into furnace F-3.

function.name: audit_kelp_forest_canopy_density
function.description: Audit canopy density along a kelp forest transect.

prompt: Audit transect MNT-04 — I counted about 7.2 stipes per square meter.

function.name: model_pyroclastic_flow_runout
function.description: Model the runout distance of a pyroclastic density current from an eruption.

column_collapse_height_km.description: Height of collapsing eruption column in km

slope_angle_deg.description: Average flank slope angle in degrees

particle_density_kg_m3.description: Average density of suspended particles in kg/m3

prompt: Model a PDC runout for Merapi — column collapse from 14 km, average flank slope around 24 degrees, particle density about 1850 kg/m3.

function.name: design_castle_machicolation_array
function.description: Design a defensive machicolation arrangement for a medieval castle wall.

embrasure_spacing_m.description: Spacing between machicolation embrasures in meters

prompt: Design machicolation for wall segment NW-2: it's 38 meters long, the corbel overhang should be 95 cm, and embrasures every 1.4 meters.

function.name: synthesize_perfumers_chypre_accord
function.description: Synthesize a chypre fragrance accord with weighted components.

prompt: Mix a chypre accord — 32% bergamot, 22% oakmoss, 28% labdanum, 18% patchouli.

function.name: schedule_arctic_polynya_drone_survey
function.description: Schedule a UAV survey over a recurring arctic polynya (open-water area).

flight_altitude_m.description: Drone flight altitude in meters AGL

prompt: Schedule a drone survey over the North Water Polynya on 2026-06-12, fly at 400 meters AGL, thermal-IR payload.

function.name: project_caravanserai_water_demand
function.description: Project daily water demand for a desert caravanserai given throughput.

prompt: Project water demand for the Sultanhani caravanserai in high summer — expect 140 camels and 90 travelers per day.

function.name: compile_shipwreck_dendro_provenance
function.description: Compile a dendrochronology-based provenance report for a shipwreck timber set.

species_mix.description: Description of species mix, e.g. oak/pine

candidate_region.description: Proposed source region for the timber

prompt: Compile a provenance report for the Mary Rose timbers — 24 oak samples, mostly southern English oak, candidate region Hampshire-Sussex weald.

function.name: optimize_kiln_anagama_firing_schedule
function.description: Optimize a multi-day firing schedule for a wood-fired anagama kiln.

wood_species.description: Primary wood species for the firing

prompt: Optimize the schedule for kiln AN-1 — we are firing to cone 13 using red pine over 6 days.

function.name: reconstruct_ostraca_voting_tally
function.description: Reconstruct an ancient Greek ostracism vote tally from inscribed pottery sherds.

find_site.description: Archaeological site where ostraca were found

candidate_names.description: List of candidate names appearing on the sherds

prompt: Reconstruct an ostracism tally from the Athenian Agora, 1903 sherds analyzed, with names Themistokles, Aristides, and Kimon appearing.

function.name: balance_ringing_tower_load
function.description: Compute load balancing for a bell tower given asymmetric bell hangings.

bell_weights_kg.description: List of bell weights in kilograms, heaviest first

frame_material.description: Bellframe material, e.g. oak, cast iron, steel

prompt: Balance the load for tower BT-2 — bells of 1120, 880, 640, and 410 kg, oak frame, swing angle 165 degrees.

function.name: draft_illuminated_manuscript_quire_layout
function.description: Draft a quire and folio layout for an illuminated manuscript commission.

folios_per_quire.description: Folios per quire (typically 8 for a quaternion)

prompt: Draft a quire layout for the Hours of Saint Adela — 14 quires of 8 folios each, with 22 full-page miniatures.
